About

The short version

BloomDay is a mobile task planner that rewards productivity by growing a virtual garden. Every completed task waters your plants, helping them grow from tiny seeds into beautiful full blooms.

With more than 100 hand-designed plant species across 12 unique garden themes, BloomDay transforms mundane to-do lists into a delightful, visual experience that makes getting things done genuinely satisfying.
Platform
iOS and Android
Pricing
Free with optional premium
Plant Species
100+ unique designs
Garden Themes
12 themed environments
Key Features

What makes BloomDay different

100+ Plant Species

Hand-designed plants that grow through multiple stages, from seed to full bloom. Each species has unique artwork.

12 Garden Themes

Choose your world from 12 beautifully designed garden environments. Each with its own unique atmosphere and personality.

Focus Mode with Ambient Sound

Deep work sessions with a rich library of soundscapes including lofi, tabla, downbeat, cumbia, afrobeat, birds, cat purr, and more.

Streaks and Habits

Build consistency with streak tracking. Visual progress that motivates you to keep your garden thriving.

Time Capsule Letters

Write letters to your future self. A reflective feature that adds meaning to your productivity journey.

Home Screen Widget

See your garden and tasks at a glance. Beautiful widgets that bring BloomDay to your home screen.

3D Assets

Hand-crafted artwork

Founder

The story behind BloomDay

EA

Ezgi Acar

Solo Founder

BloomDay was built entirely by Ezgi Acar, a former humanitarian worker who transitioned into app development during a career change. Using AI tools to accelerate development, she created BloomDay as a passion project that combines her love of productivity systems with the calming presence of plants.

The app is built with React Native (Expo), Supabase for the backend, RevenueCat for subscriptions, and Resend for emails. Every plant illustration was hand-designed to bring warmth and personality to the experience.

Boilerplate

Ready-to-use descriptions

Short

~25 words

BloomDay is a mobile task planner that rewards productivity by growing a virtual garden. Complete tasks to water your plants and watch them bloom.

Medium

~60 words

BloomDay transforms everyday tasks into a delightful garden-growing experience. Every completed task waters your plants, helping them grow from seeds to full bloom. With more than 100 plant species, 12 garden themes, focus mode with sounds like lofi, tabla, and afrobeat, plus streak tracking, BloomDay makes productivity genuinely rewarding.

Long

~100 words

BloomDay is a mobile productivity app that gamifies task completion by growing a virtual garden. Every finished task waters your plants, nurturing them from tiny seeds through multiple growth stages to beautiful full blooms. Choose from more than 100 hand-designed plant species across 12 themed garden environments. Features include focus mode with a rich sound library — lofi, tabla, downbeat, cumbia, afrobeat, birds, cat purr, and more — plus habit streaks, time capsule letters to your future self, and home screen widgets. Built by solo founder Ezgi Acar, BloomDay is free with optional premium, available on iOS and Android.
